summary: Fallow is a residential yoga and wellness retreat in the Welsh Marches, presented through a calm, airy editorial site covering its ethos, multi-day programs, the space and accommodation, the teachers, and how to visit.

pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Brand hero, ethos snapshot, featured programs, space and teacher previews, and reservation call to action.

pages.title: The Retreat
pages.purpose: Origin story, philosophy, guiding principles, the shape of a day, and the land itself.

pages.title: Programs
pages.purpose: The multi-day residential retreats with seasonal dates, all-inclusive rates, and what is included.

pages.title: The Space
pages.purpose: Gallery and detail of the practice barn, rooms and accommodation, the kitchen table, and amenities.

pages.title: Teachers
pages.purpose: Founder feature and the small faculty who lead practice, breath, yin, walking and rest.

pages.title: Visit
pages.purpose: How booking works, rates, contact, getting here, and a plain-spoken FAQ.
